venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner with open-seating service. Daily-changing menus of contemporary and classic dishes; complimentary caviar available on request at dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Colonnade
venues.description: Casual indoor/outdoor restaurant aft. Buffet breakfast and lunch daily; regionally themed dinner with full table service in the evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Patio
venues.description: Open-air poolside venue serving casual lunches: burgers, salads, grilled seafood, and light bites. Includes a sushi and sashimi selection at lunchtime. Open most afternoons at sea. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill by Thomas Keller
venues.description: Signature restaurant by chef Thomas Keller, present on Seabourn Encore from launch. Classic American chophouse menu: prime beef dry-aged in-house, Dover sole meunière, iceberg wedge, and signature sides. Complimentary; advance reservations required.

venues.name: Seabourn Square
venues.description: The social hub on Deck 7 — complimentary specialty coffees, pastries, sandwiches, and light snacks throughout the day. Concierge and guest services also located here.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. Full Restaurant menu during dinner hours; breakfast, lunch, and snack menus available throughout the day.
